definition: a communication device operating in space
example: The concert was broadcast live by satellite.

definition: the action or way of punishing someone
example: He was exiled from his own country as a punishment.

definition: able to move from place to place easily; able to move easily
example: She's more mobile now that she has her own car.

definition: to make something happen or occur
example: The heavy rain caused the river to overflow.

definition: to closely observe
example: Let's examine the possible reasons.

definition: to bet money on an outcome or result
example: I seldom gamble at the casino.

definition: working to prevent something from being damaged
example: You will find that officials are very protective of their community.

definition: the breaking of a rule or law
example: Because it was his first offence, the punishment was not too severe.

definition: a part of the body where two bones fit together
example: His left arm is out of joint.

definition: a story or description of real events; the description of events in a story
example: He writes interesting narratives.

definition: said of a wound or injury to a part of the body
example: I have a sore throat.

definition: information or documents showing something is true
example: There is no proof that he is guilty.

definition: at present; at the moment
example: We are currently adding new science games and tutorials.

definition: a specific kind of something, especially a plant or animal
example: This wolf and the dog belong to the same species.

definition: agreed to or arranged by people in position of authority
example: This is not the official format paper.

definition: held legally responsible
example: He stated that he was not liable for his wife's debts.

definition: to insert liquid into someone's body with a medical needle
example: The nurse injected me painlessly.

definition: a thing such as a building, a house or a piece of land
example: This is my property.

definition: in case; if
example: We must decide whether to make him do the work or not.

definition: to set up or found
example: The Web site was initially launched in.
